title: Notification No.14/2000-Cus(NT), dated 25.2.2000
text: This notification appoints the Commissioner of Customs, Calcutta to be the Commissioner of Customs having jurisdiction over the whole of India 25th February, 2000 Notification NO. 14/2000-Customs (N.T.) In exercise of the powers conferred by sub-section (1) of section 4 of the Customs Act, 1962 (52 of 1962), the Central Government hereby appoints the Commissioner of Customs, Calcutta to be the Commissioner of Customs having jurisdiction over the whole of India under the said Act and the rules made thereunder for the purpose of investigation, issue of Show Cause Notices against M/s. Indian Oil Corporation Limited in respect of their consolidated duty liability on account of non-inlusion of ship"s detention / demurrage and other charges in the assessable value and also adjudication of the cases relating thereto. ( DR. VINAYAK PRASAD) UNDER SECRETARY TO THE GOVERNMENT OF INDIA F.NO. 437/3/2000-CUS.IV -- 1 of 1 --
